mapper.select: select count(*) from recommendation where REC_STATUS = 'Y'
select * from recommendation where REC_STATUS = 'Y' order by REC_CREATE_DATE desc
mapper.insert:
select REC_SEQ.nextval from dual
insert into recommendation values (#{recNo}, #{recTitle}, #{recContent}, #{recStyle}, default, #{recReply}, #{recAttachment}, sysdate, sysdate, #{memId})

insert all
into attachment values(ATT_NEW, #{item.attRename}, default, #{item.attFno}, #{item.attCategory}, #{item.attBno})
select * from dual
